mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO MA3_OPEN_BANK_API_STSC ( TRAD_DATE , API_URL , API_DETAIL_CLS , SUCCESS_CNT , ERROR_CNT , RETRY_CNT ) ( SELECT value(TB1.TRAD_DATE, value(TB2.TRAD_DATE, TB3.TRAD_DATE)) TRAD_DATE , value(TB1.API_URL, value(TB2.API_URL, TB3.API_URL)) API_URL , value(TB1.API_DETAIL_CLS, value(TB2.API_DETAIL_CLS, TB3.API_DETAIL_CLS)) API_DETAIL_CLS , value(SUCCESS_CNT, 0) SUCCESS_CNT , value(ERROR_CNT, 0) ERROR_CNT , value(RETRY_CNT, 0) RETRY_CNT FROM (
SELECT TRAD_DATE, API_URL, API_DETAIL_CLS, COUNT(TRAD_DATE) SUCCESS_CNT FROM MA3_OPEN_BANK_API_LOG WHERE TRAD_CLS = 'R' AND TRAD_DATE = #{tradDate} AND RES_CODE = 'A0000' AND (BANK_RSP_CODE = '-' OR BANK_RSP_CODE = '000') GROUP BY TRAD_DATE, API_URL, API_DETAIL_CLS ) TB1 FULL OUTER JOIN (
SELECT TRAD_DATE, API_URL, API_DETAIL_CLS, COUNT(TRAD_DATE) ERROR_CNT FROM MA3_OPEN_BANK_API_LOG WHERE TRAD_CLS = 'R' AND TRAD_DATE = #{tradDate} AND RES_CODE <> 'A0000' AND (BANK_RSP_CODE <> '400') GROUP BY TRAD_DATE, API_URL, API_DETAIL_CLS ) TB2 ON TB1.TRAD_DATE = TB2.TRAD_DATE AND TB1.API_URL = TB2.API_URL AND TB1.API_DETAIL_CLS = TB2.API_DETAIL_CLS FULL OUTER JOIN (
SELECT TRAD_DATE, API_URL, API_DETAIL_CLS, COUNT(TRAD_DATE) RETRY_CNT FROM MA3_OPEN_BANK_API_LOG WHERE TRAD_CLS = 'R' AND TRAD_DATE = #{tradDate} AND RES_CODE <> 'A0000' AND (BANK_RSP_CODE = '400') GROUP BY TRAD_DATE, API_URL, API_DETAIL_CLS )TB3 ON TB1.TRAD_DATE = TB3.TRAD_DATE AND TB1.API_URL = TB3.API_URL AND TB1.API_DETAIL_CLS = TB3.API_DETAIL_CLS WITH UR )
